docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT GUERRA, MARIA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, MARIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOYOLA, GISELE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUERRA, MARIA $1,048.36 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,078.36, PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED HER CLAIM FOR PAYMENT OF UTILITIES & CLEANING CHARGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-23-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO PLAINTIFF LOYOLA, GISELE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY LOYOLA, GISELE GUERRA, MARIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,048.36 FILED BY LOYOLA, GISELE AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---DANIEL NAVARRO. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2016 - JUDGMENT.
